description: Edge graph connecting Tibsfox Research nodes. Phase 690 drift-hub seed (10 edges). Baseline constellation edges are in the constellation graph; this file tracks named semantic cross-reference edges only.

edges.label: Drift-hub aligns with alignment audit research
edges.notes: The AAR alignment audit and drift-hub both address LLM behavioral fidelity; BCI / ASI metrics generalize the AAR concern

edges.label: Drift-hub extends the AI cluster hub
edges.notes: DRIFT is the primary v1.49.569 node in the AI & Computation cluster; connects to Erdos-1196 and Nonlinear Frontier M5 AI weather

edges.label: Drift-hub member of AI & Computation (SST) cluster
edges.notes: SST is the AI & Computation Rosetta cluster; DRIFT joins as 6th member alongside erdos-1196, GFX, BLN/M5, CSP

edges.label: Scope drift in staging layer mirrors Module D §2
edges.notes: Phase 684 CONTEXT.md D-09 Module D §2 identifies scope drift as a cross-surface phenomenon; the staging-layer research node is the engineering analog

edges.label: Module A anchors to data-science-knowledge-drift concept
edges.notes: Module A (knowledge.html) is the primary research expression of the data-science-knowledge-drift college concept

edges.label: Module B anchors to ai-computation-alignment-drift concept
edges.notes: Module B (alignment.html) is the primary research expression of the ai-computation-alignment-drift college concept

edges.label: Module C anchors to ai-computation-grounding-faithfulness concept
edges.notes: Module C (retrieval.html) is the primary research expression of the ai-computation-grounding-faithfulness college concept (SGI section)

edges.label: Drift and Erdos-1196 share AI frontier framing
edges.notes: Both DRIFT and Erdos-1196 concern the same model families (Claude 3.5, GPT-4o) in different operational modes: one drifting from instructions, the other solving prize mathematics

edges.label: Drift M5 weather models share AI-computation concern with NLF
edges.notes: NLF Module 5 (AIFS, GraphCast) are LLM-adjacent production systems; retrieval drift is a risk in live-data AI weather pipelines

edges.label: Drift hub bridges to adaptive-systems department
edges.notes: Context-equilibrium and ASI (adaptive-systems dept concepts) are direct theoretical grounding for Module B findings on multi-turn drift dynamics
